Read-only My Predictions dashboard implemented, reviewed, 216 tests green, runtime + visual smoke confirmed.
Admin console shipped in v0.4.0: prediction entry on behalf of players (by-player + by-fixture audit), fixtures sync/override/cohort, player promote. Reviewed + booster-on-blank fix.
CI/CD pipeline shipped and proven — deployed v0.2.x, v0.3.0, v0.4.0, v0.4.1 cleanly (build -> GHCR -> Tailscale SSH -> homelab migrate/recreate -> /health). Stale in_progress.

Shipped in v0.5.0. mt6: hourly... ResultSync Oban worker (every 15m) runs Ingest.sync_from_url. 7ux: CohortSync Oban worker (hourly) pulls FIFA matchStats.json, pure Fifa.Cohort.plan joins by {utc_date,team-set} + orientation, overwrites cohort_*_pct.

Shipped in v0.5.0. mt6: hourly... ResultSync Oban worker (every 15m) runs Ingest.sync_from_url. 7ux: CohortSync Oban worker (hourly) pulls FIFA matchStats.json, pure Fifa.Cohort.plan joins by {utc_date,team-set} + orientation, overwrites cohort_*_pct.

Bookmarklet URL now derived from PredictexWeb.Endpoint.url() so the dev page emits a localhost bookmarklet and prod emits the prod one. Was blocking local manual validation (dev page emitted a prod-pointing bookmarklet -> 404 on undeployed prod).

Implemented Predictex.dc.html design: themed app.css (pitch-green/gold, dark default) + fonts, fixture_card/leaderboard_row/auth_card atoms, champion-spotlight leaderboard, branded My Predictions/auth/navbar/admin. 275 tests pass; verified in browser. Deferred items filed as follow-ups.
Done: Phoenix logo/favicon removed, Predictex favicon added, title suffix + static_paths fixed. 275 tests pass; no stale references.

Group-stage mum-proof FIFA import shipped & deployed to prod (run 27661365740, health 200). Smoke-tested in real browser; one bug (placeholder interpolation) found & fixed. Follow-ups tracked: dnp/066/fs6/xww.

Champion card now reads 'N from fixtures · N bonus' (was 'N fixtures', misread as a count); row columns get title tooltips clarifying fixture vs bonus points. Regression test added; verified in browser. Fixed in leaderboard_live.ex:70 + predictex_components.ex.
Added a primary 'Import picks' nav link (→/import) for authenticated players in root.html.heex — discoverable from every page. Verified in browser.
Group-stage import shipped & live (v0.8.0); knockout tracked in predictex-i9k. Member self-import may later be superseded by native entry (predictex-2ww).

Spike complete: FIFA v3 live contract decoded (live MatchStatus=3 confirmed from the Portugal v DR Congo capture, 696 rows), capture worker shipped. Its persistence folds into predictex-rfm (FifaLiveCapture retired there). c46 shipped on top.

Auto-start unified live capture shipped: 6-task TDD via subagent-driven-development, all on main (4d0c566..7e32c46), full gate green (335 tests). Whole-branch opus review READY-WITH-FIXES, no Critical, 5 invariants hold. Producer/PubSub-subscriber arch: shared Predictex.LiveScore decoder; Spike retired -> permanent Predictex.Capture; Capture.Recorder (event source) + Live.Updater (buzz) subscribers; LiveScoreSync producer publishes on fifa:snapshots, auto-started by Oban Cron */5 with unique:[period:40,states:[:scheduled]] (the only value excluding :executing AND warning-clean on Oban 2.23). Follow-ups filed: predictex-cvx (knockout window truncation, P2), predictex-l3n (LOWs polish, P3). NOT deployed — needs vX.Y.Z tag, user's production-readiness call.

Fixed via idiomatic server-side per-viewer timezone (not the initial client JS hook, which was reworked out). JS reports the browser IANA zone once via LiveSocket _tz connect param + a tz cookie; a :browser plug copies the cookie to session; PredictexWeb.TimeZone on_mount assigns @tz (connect-param when connected, session/cookie on dead render, Etc/UTC fallback) to the :require_authenticated_player live_session; pure testable PredictexWeb.TimeHelpers.kickoff/2 shifts UTC->local via the tz lib (defensive UTC fallback on bad/spoofed zones). local_time/1 renders server-localized <time>. Commit 1e0e125 (supersedes client-hook 717a663). Opus review approved; 347 tests, assets.build clean. On main locally; NOT deployed (needs tag).

Live game on /predictions is now a CTA: when :live_buzz on AND fixture.is_live, the LIVE badge on the FixtureCard is a contained <.link navigate> to /fixtures/:id (the live drill-down); non-live cards unchanged; no nested anchor. live_path passed as a component attr from my_predictions (which has ~p). Commit d957a3f; tested (href present when live, absent when not). On main (pushed); NOT deployed.

Shipped in v0.11.2 (commit 5d8fad4): @post_min 150->210 covers knockout ET/pens + the finished frame; independent clear_stuck_live/1 sweep auto-clears stuck is_live (status=:completed OR past-window). Deployed to prod — Deploy job ran (not skipped), /health 200. End-to-end behavioral validation on a real knockout (ET/shootout + is_live clear) tracked on predictex-hco for first KO 2026-06-28.

Self-healed by predictex-cvx's clear_stuck_live/1 status-branch: once openfootball marks status=:completed, the sweep clears is_live within ~one ResultSync cycle even while the producer chain is alive and regardless of FIFA endpoint health — exactly the d17 endpoint-stall root cause. Shipped + deployed in v0.11.2; covered by the d17 fast-path unit test. Prod validation shared with hco.

Live fixture drill-down + what-if buzz shipped v0.10.2, live on prod. All AC met for group stage: live-gated drillability (UI entry points gate on is_live), post-kickoff anti-copy picks reveal, projected leaderboard honouring booster+risky (Standings.project/3 reuses real rank/2 path), end-now/home-next/away-next scenarios with tested rank-change statements (buzz_test.exs AC#4), and YOU framing. 11 tests pass. Knockout first-team/first-scorer picks display deferred to predictex-hco (can't exercise until first KO 2026-06-28; needs hco backfill data).

Shipped v0.11.3 and verified live on prod. /predictions live CTA now opens 30 min before kickoff ('Match preview'), through live (score), and after full-time ('Match recap'); pure Predictions.cta_window?/2 + live_cta? attr; 362 tests green. Deploy job RAN (build+push image, SSH recreate); prod rpc confirms cta_window?(kickoff+20m)=true / (+60m)=false, root HTTP 200; :live_buzz already enabled globally so visible to all members.

Shipped v0.11.4 and verified live on prod. Next-match countdown banner on /predictions: pure Dashboard.next_match/2 + colocated .Countdown hook (adaptive in 2d4h / in 3h12m / mm:ss / now). Deployed without a feature flag per user decision (low-impact, move-fast during in-flight tournament). Deploy job RAN (build+push image, SSH recreate); prod confirms function_exported?(Dashboard,:next_match,2)=true and a real upcoming fixture (2026-06-18 19:00Z) is present so the banner renders with live data; root HTTP 200. 367 tests green. NOTE: JS tick is contract-verified server-side (element + data-kickoff asserted) and now rendering on prod with real data, but the per-second countdown was not separately eyeballed in a browser.

Local pre-commit gate wired and verified. lefthook.yml runs mix precommit on commits staging Elixir files (glob-scoped so beads/docs commits stay fast). precommit alias aligned to CI Quality job (deps.unlock --check-unused, format --check-formatted) — single source, no local-remote seam. Beads owns core.hooksPath, so the gate is invoked from the committed .beads/hooks/pre-commit outside the beads markers (verified bd hooks install preserves it) — propagates via the committed hook, no separate install. Gate-bypass blocked by a Claude Code PreToolUse hook (scripts/guard-no-verify.sh in .claude/settings.json), which strips quoted commit messages so it only matches real CLI flags (7-case test: flag blocks in any position, message-mentions allowed). Verified: gate blocks a mis-formatted staged file; mix precommit green 367 tests. Dev tooling — not a prod deploy.

Static analysis added. credo + sobelow deps (dev/test, runtime: false). credo --strict wired into the precommit alias (gate) AND the CI Quality job; sobelow runs in CI (mix sobelow --skip --exit Low). Baseline: tuned .credo.exs (alias-order off, design/alias-usage off, nesting max 3 — documented inline) and fixed genuine findings (Enum.map_join in capture.ex, negated if-else in fifa/import.ex, length/1->!=[] in a test, @moduledoc false x2, zero-arity parens) -> credo --strict GREEN (0 issues). sobelow baseline recorded in .sobelow-skips: missing CSP (-> follow-up predictex-y58) + a low-confidence File.read! on a trusted admin path; new findings beyond baseline fail CI. mix precommit green (367 tests) with credo included. CLAUDE.md documents it.

Verified end-to-end on networked Mac/OrbStack (Docker 29.4.0): scripts/pre-deploy ran green through mix precommit (367 tests), sobelow, docker image build (mix assets.setup Tailwind v4.3.0 + esbuild downloaded successfully — the step that failed under the egress-blocked sandbox), and the bin/predictex eval release-boot smoke test. Reached '== pre-deploy OK — safe to tag ==' (exit 0). AC met.

Strict hash-based CSP shipped on the :browser pipeline and browser-verified. All AC met: (1) CSP header served via put_secure_browser_headers; (2) app renders + LiveView websocket connects + inline theme script executes/toggles + Google Fonts load with ZERO console CSP violations across /, /players/log-in, and authed /predictions (chrome-devtools); (3) Config.CSP removed from .sobelow-skips, sobelow --skip --exit Low green. Non-circular guard test added (370 tests pass, gate green).

Resolved by contracting the live_buzz flag rather than centralizing its cleanup. Per the parallel-change model (flag = expand→migrate→contract) and the PO's call that live_buzz is accepted in prod, the flag was removed: gates stripped from FixtureLive/LeaderboardLive/MyPredictionsLive + fixture_card (feature now unconditional), off-path tests deleted, flag enable/disable removed from all tests, flags_test.exs deleted. With no flag, there is no flag state for DataCase/ConnCase to reset — the AC's intent (no scattered cleanup, tests don't fuss over flag state) is met by removal. FunWithFlags dep + /admin/feature-flags dashboard retained as the dark-ship mechanism for future flags. Full suite 367 green across seeds 0,1,2,42,7 + mix precommit green. NOTE: the original async goal is deferred to predictex- (filed) — flag tests stay async:false because the earlier async attempt surfaced unrelated cross-module round!/0 races. Kill-switch removed: live-feed failure mitigation is now revert+redeploy. Needs a deploy (untagged) to land in prod.
Extracted PredictexWeb.AdminWriteResult.handle/5; all 3 admin LiveViews delegate; booster_on_blank message preserved + LV-tested. 372 tests green.
Wired mount_current_scope on / (live_session :public); leaderboard highlights logged-in player — chasing-pack row + champion hero YOU. 3 LV tests (logged-out/chasing/champion). 375 green.

Acceptance met: next_tick_delay/2 domain table + send(:tick) re-render LiveView test; gate green (400 passed). Deferred (separate beads): 9p0 (drop 30s poll → fifa:snapshots PubSub).

Folded into i1s: replay is a per-fixture FixtureLive control behind the :match_replay flag, not an admin global toggle. No separate admin button to build.
Eyeballed in prod 2026-06-21: settled group-stage goal breakdown renders correctly. Verified.

Eyeballed in prod (v0.11.12): 'If your pick lands' verified pre-kickoff (own row + 'you'd be #N' headline, no other names) and during live play (full board, viewer row highlighted). Working as designed.

No-dup invariant verified in prod 2026-06-23 at partial bracket resolution: 3 R32 teams (Germany/Mexico/USA) resolved in place via source_num with dup_source_num=[] and dup_external_ref=[] across all 32 KO fixtures. Mechanism proven; remaining slots resolve the same way as the group stage finishes.

Committed openfootball 2026 team-name snapshot (test/support/fixtures/openfootball/team_names_2026.txt, 109 distinct feed strings frozen 2026-06-23) + golden-file regression test (flags_snapshot_test.exs). Asserts Flags ≡ the feed's 48 real nations exactly (coverage + no-stale, both directions) and every bracket placeholder falls back to ⚽. Mutation-verified: an uncovered nation fails the coverage test. Regen via curl|jq documented in the test moduledoc — the deliberate stand-in for the live-feed fetch CI can't run.

Got the 3 ConnCase live-test files (fixture_live, leaderboard, my_predictions) to async:true. Root cause was TWO independent issues, not the bead's single 'round!/0 unique-constraint' guess: (1) Replay.Cache — a supervised singleton GenServer (test-gated-out of the app tree, started via start_supervised! in the replay describe) reads the Repo in its OWN process, so under async/isolated sandbox it had no ownership → DBConnection.OwnershipError on the 4 replay tests. Fixed with Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.allow/3 granting it the test's connection (race-free: module tests are sequential, only this block uses the Cache). (2) rounds.ordinal unique-index DEADLOCK (40P01): live_ids_test 'assign/1' inserted KO ordinal 4 before group ordinal 1 (descending) while every other async module inserts ascending → concurrent sandbox transactions formed a lock cycle, PG killed one. This is the real 'known intermittent flake'/Postgrex-disconnect; MAIN was 0/8 but the async flip raised it to ~25% on seed 0. Fixed by reordering to ascending; the suite-wide 'create rounds ascending' invariant is now documented in DataCase.setup_sandbox (where a test author will hit it), so a 40P01 recurrence is self-diagnosing. The bead's 'unique-constraint' intuition was half-right (it IS a unique-index interaction in create_round) but missed the Replay.Cache cause. Verified: full suite 0/20 failures (heavy on seed 0); mix precommit green (499 passed). NOTE: the 'Postgrex disconnected' log line is known-benign sandbox-owner teardown noise — present on green main, never correlates with a failure; not the flake.

Per-fixture scoring breakdown chips + risky-pick banner on FixtureCard. Scoring.score/3 already exposed :components; surfaced them (+risky_pct) through Dashboard.fixture_view and rendered breakdown chips + 'Risky pick paid off — only N% backed it' banner in fixture_card/1. Booster reconciliation via ×2 badge (chips are base values, points is doubled). code-reviewer APPROVED; 507 tests green.
Fixed: all 4 prediction writers now emit :fixtures_changed on success via broadcast_on_success/1. TDD'd (5 tests); full gate green (512).
